package sample

import "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"

func SmallErrorPayloadsWithColonStrings(c *gin.Context) {
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&struct{}{}); err != nil {
		c.JSON(400, gin.H{"error": "failed to parse payload: " + err.Error()})
		return
	}

	if _, err := c.FormFile("font"); err != nil {
		c.JSON(400, gin.H{"error": "failed to open file: " + err.Error()})
		return
	}

	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
